MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.telegram
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/telegram.py (508 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Telegram Channel Adapter
====================================

Telegram Bot API integration for the Cosmos swarm.

Features:
- Long-polling and webhook support
- Inline keyboards and callbacks
- Media handling (photos, videos, audio, documents)
- Group and supergroup support
- Forum topic thr

CLASSES:
- TelegramChannel(BaseChannel): Telegram Bot API channel adapter.

Supports:
- Direct messages
- Groups and supe
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, chat_id: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None, reply_to: Opti
  Methods: def register_command(self, command: str, handler: Callable)
  Methods: def register_callback_prefix(self, prefix: str, handler: Callable)
  Methods: async def edit_message(self, chat_id: str, message_id: str, text: str, buttons: List[List[Dict]]=Non
  Methods: async def delete_message(self, chat_id: str, message_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_chat_info(self, chat_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]
